Tuesday Host Control Room Brian Keith Hill · Private
Open Meetn Room

Faith • Fatherhood • Future Readiness

Everything you need to coach in one place.

00:00
Ready to start

Before Going Live

Camera: Not checked
Microphone: Not checked
Meetn: Open the room before starting

Scripture Panel

"Love one another deeply, from the heart." 1 Peter 1:22

Session Agenda

  1. Welcome the fathers into the room.
  2. Open with prayer and emotional honesty.
  3. Teach that the father changes first.
  4. Invite discussion and one real question.
  5. Offer the next step: AI coach, assessment, replays.
  6. Close in prayer.

Teaching Notes

Start with the room, not the technology. Name the distance honestly and remind fathers they are not here to perform; they are here to become present, aligned, and available.

Core line: the father changes first. Purpose gives direction, Authority protects without controlling, Presence rebuilds trust, and Alignment makes words match behavior.

Ask one question at a time. Leave room for silence. Bring every answer back to a next faithful step.

Current Step

1 Welcome
